title: From the Archives | International Women’s Day 2026
description: International Women’s Day, celebrated annually on 8th March, has its origins in labour and resistance movements of the 20th century. Life in the 21st century continues to be riddled with structural violence and inequalities of income, entitlements, and care at homes and in workplaces.
